title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NSE Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE Digital Technologies:
NSE Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
